name: Borderlands 3
description: The original shooter-looter returns, packing bazillions of guns and a mayhem-fueled adventure! Blast through new worlds and enemies as one of four new Vault Hunters.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/10 (latest service pack)
  • Processor: AMD FX-8350 or Intel i5-3570
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ HD 7970 or NVIDIA GeForce GTX 680 2 GB
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 75 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
comment1:
[h1]Borderlands 3[/h1]

still fun as remember when i played it on the ps4 (pre-ordered at the time) honestly i don't get why it's hated so much. yes the dialogues can be corny sometimes and the main campaign have some weak missions that after the first time becomes boring/heavy to replay but it's not so bad as people proclaim, also you can skip it if you own the dlc's and honestly they improve the base game by a mile i suggest to get all of them anyway especially when they are on sale. the gameplay is still incredibly smooth and fun as i remembered the guns feels incredible and the loot is rewarding and interesting to chase a good looter-shooter experience and i really love this genre :P. a little note performance wise the game runs well if you use optimized settings otherwise in heavy chaotic scenes the fps drops will become noticable, and sometimes the games do little stutters but besides this it runs greatly no big complains (bit sad that you can't lower particle effects unless you use mods or edit the game files).

[b]MY PERSONAL DLC'S ENJOYMENT LIST[/b]
played all of them back to back for the first time

- Bounty of Blood
- Psycho Krieg and the Fantastic Fustercluck
- Moxxi's Heist of the Handsome Jackpot
- Designer's Cut 
- Guns, Love, and Tentacles
- Director's Cut
comment2:
好游戏，但我不推荐Take-Two Interactive旗下任何一款游戏。
Good game but I do not recommend any game published by Take-Two Interactive.

2025年2月28日，Take-Two更新了旗下所有游戏的EULA。2025年6月。
On February 28, 2025, Take-Two updated its EULA for all titles.

新协议条款包括：收集设备标识符、IP地址、精准地理位置、支付信息（含信用卡/借记卡号）、网站和应用浏览记录、账户凭证，并获取系统根目录访问权限；美国及澳大利亚、瑞士、英国、欧洲经济区以外地区的用户须放弃集体诉讼和陪审团审判权利，一切争议通过有约束力的个人仲裁解决；禁止使用修改器、MOD、漏洞利用，禁止使用VPN、代理服务器、虚拟机伪装位置或居住地。协议适用于Take-Two旗下所有游戏。
The updated terms include: collection of device identifiers, IP addresses, precise geolocation, payment information (including credit/debit card numbers), web and app browsing history, account credentials, and root-level access to the system directory; users in the U.S. and regions outside Australia, Switzerland, the U.K., and the EEA must waive class action and jury trial rights, resolving all disputes through binding individual arbitration; and the prohibition of mods, cheats, exploits, VPNs, proxies, and virtual machines used to disguise location or residence. These terms apply to all Take-Two games.

我只推荐你在无法获取盗版的情况下购买。
I only recommend purchasing if you cannot obtain a pirated copy.
comment3: the story is a hit or miss at points BUT the gameplay is solid
